name: architect
description: Design system architecture, SDS, API specs (OpenAPI 3.0), ER diagrams, and development plans with work breakdowns. Triggers on: design, architecture, tech stack, API spec, dev plan, WBS, ออกแบบ, สถาปัตยกรรม, โครงสร้าง, แผนพัฒนา. Combines technical-architect + system-analyst + development-planner.
